title: cirsium hida-paludosum
intro: Cirsium hida-paludosum, also known as the Hida thistle, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Japan. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cirsium hida-paludosum include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote overall health and well-being.
